revision_summary:
Three targeted fixes required before Stage 3 is production-ready:

1. CODEX REFERENCE CORRECTIONS (two instances): (a) cherry_pick_moments[0] — replace coaching_philosophy.objection_inversion with verify.interest_in_solar as the primary codex reference. John's 00:52 statement is a motivation clarification, not a cost/time/interest objection; the inversion flip is not the right tool here. The failure is a verify depth miss on the emotional anchor item. (b) cherry_pick_moments[4] — replace coaching_philosophy.setter_scope_discipline with coaching_philosophy.curiosity_over_features + verify.prior_designs. Joel's one-sentence equipment comment does not meet the codex's scope_creep threshold (explaining specs, debating operations); it's a curiosity-creation failure and a prior-inquiry diagnostic miss.

2. ADD TWO MISSED CHERRY_PICK MOMENTS: (a) 04:01 — John's disclosure that he 'sometimes doesn't get [bills] at all' is a bill_collection_friction_signal the codex explicitly addresses under bill_collection.alternative_paths. Joel ignores it and doubles down on the paper-bill path. This is a direct codex coverage gap. (b) 03:15 — The prior inquiry diagnostic miss deserves its own entry with the timestamp and quote, not just a mention inside cherry_pick_moments[3]'s coaching_implication. The absence of 'What stopped you from moving forward last time?' is a standalone coaching moment.

3. MINOR FRAMING FIXES: (a) trajectory_verdict.outcome_dispute — reframe the dispute as conditional ('if v1 tagged this as booked, that tag is incorrect') rather than disputing an explicitly unknown tag. (b) trajectory_verdict.summary — revise 'structurally competent' to reflect that the button_up was entirely absent and the title question unresolved; the call has more structural gaps than the current summary conveys. (c) coaching_focus[0].why — soften 'the one move that could have shifted John' to 'the highest-leverage available move' to avoid overstating certainty about outcome causation.
